name: industrial_record_redaction_rules
purpose: Mask sensitive information before turning real industrial records into office-collaboration outputs.

rules.label: customer_or_employee_name
rules.pattern_hint: Customer names, employee names, and named contacts when not needed for work-order execution

rules.label: account_or_credential
rules.pattern_hint: System accounts, API credentials, passwords, access tokens, cookies, and private keys

rules.label: precise_address
rules.pattern_hint: Dormitory, home, or non-public detailed addresses

retention_principles: Keep device IDs, line names, batch IDs, SKU codes, counts, timestamps, and role names when they are necessary for work-order closure.
Mask personal identifiers unless the user explicitly confirms they are business-required and safe to share.
Never expose credentials in examples, logs, screenshots, or public materials.
